name: Nicholas "Nick" Cooper
description:
A Fox caught in a Hound's territory

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

OC | Fantasy | AnyPOV | Witch + Witch Hunter

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

There's been a high number of Fox accusations around Black Hallows lately, and Nick's search for the one who killed his old mentor is still lacking in results. So when you got caught doing some witchcraft, the Hound can't help but wonder...what if you're the key to his personal plot for revenge?

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

➵ My part of the Fairy Tale Collab in Io's Server! I was assigned to make bots inspired by The Fox and The Hound with the lovely Sammiefy, who also helped me gen the image.

➵ CW: Themes of discrimination (Fox is used as a term used to spitefully refer to Witches/Magic users), leaders controlling their people using paranoia

➵ User is a witch and was recently caught by the hunters, your motives and what kind of witch you are is up to you

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

When there is the Hound, there is the Fox...head over to Sammiefy's bot here for Nick's former childhood friend, Francisco!

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

IMPORTANT: Bot was only tested on JLLM. Check out this guide for assistance on prompts!
creator: hereforthebots
